playbook.intent: Weekly grooming: top 20 backlog items are readable, sized, dependency-mapped. Exit: 2 sprints of well-formed work ready to pull.
playbook.scope: Weekly grooming: top 20 backlog items are readable, sized, dependency-mapped. Exit: 2 sprints of well-formed work ready to pull.

success-criteria.criterion: Every item passes DoR or is sent back
Every item has a size or a 'needs split' tag

stage.name: Walk top 20
stage.intent: Walk the top 20 in the order they will be pulled.

tasks.task: Pull the top 20 into the grooming view
Tag any that lost relevance for removal

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 20 items are queued and irrelevant ones are flagged.

stage.name: Readable?
stage.intent: Every item passes a 'definition of ready' check.

tasks.task: For each item, confirm the description tells the why + the what
Add missing context; do not assume
Reject items that still cannot be read

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item passes DoR or is sent back to refinement.

stage.name: Sized?
stage.intent: Apply story points or t-shirt sizes.

tasks.task: Size with the team via planning poker or async vote
Note items that need to be split

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has a size or a 'needs split' tag.

stage.name: Dependencies?

tasks.task: Note any item blocked by a missing dependency

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each dependency has an owner.

stage.name: Ready queue

tasks.task: Promote items that pass readable + sized + dependency checks
Cap the ready queue at 2 sprints of work
Move overflow back to the wider backlog

stage.decision-gate: Required: ready queue is sized for 2 sprints of capacity.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content run-a-1-hour-backlog-grooming-session --format md, agent: faion get-content run-a-1-hour-backlog-grooming-session --format context, json: faion get-content run-a-1-hour-backlog-grooming-session --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
